Full-Stack Developer Needed for AI-Powered SaaS Platform Improvements

Posted yesterday Worldwide

Summary We're looking for a senior full-stack developer to improve an existing AI-powered SaaS platform for healthcare operations. The platform is already live, but we need focused improvements on the backend and AI workflows. Scope: Review current React / Next.js frontend and Python/FastAPI backend. Improve existing AI integration with OpenAI API, RAG, and document processing. Payment verified. $35-$55/hr. Proposals: 50+. Interviewing: 4. Client rating is 5.0 of 67 reviews. $28K total spent. 98% hire rate.
